❯ explain the codebase

● Read 2 files (ctrl+o to expand)

  How is Claude doing?
  0: Dismiss
  1: Bad
  2: Fine
  3: Good

● This is a Node.js Discord bot that bridges Discord messages to Claude Code agents running in tmux sessions.

  The key files are:
  - `index.mjs` - main entry point, Discord client setup
  - `lib.mjs` - pure helper functions
  - `agent.mjs` - tmux/agent interaction

💡 agent log _claw [-n N | --full] for more

❯
